    • 10 — Reporting & Utilities

Batch spatial feature plots for genes and/or metadata columns

GenerateSpatialFeatureMaps.Rd

Loops over features (gene names or numeric metadata columns) and produces Seurat::SpatialFeaturePlot() panels for each image in the object. A shared color scale (0 → max) is applied across all images for the same feature. Panels are arranged in a grid and a shared legend is attached.

Usage

GenerateSpatialFeatureMaps(
  seurat_object,
  features,
  layout_method = "auto",
  row_var = NULL,
  images_to_plot = NULL,
  remove_outliers = FALSE,
  outlier_prob = 0.01,
  size_override = NULL,
  colors = c("#053061", "#2166AC", "#D1E5F0", "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D", "#B2182B",
    "#67001F"),
  calcptsizesc = 3800,
  output_dir = NULL,
  object_name = "",
  subset_name = ""
)

PlotSpatialFeaturePlots(
  seurat_object,
  features,
  layout_method = "auto",
  row_var = NULL,
  images_to_plot = NULL,
  remove_outliers = FALSE,
  outlier_prob = 0.01,
  size_override = NULL,
  colors = c("#053061", "#2166AC", "#D1E5F0", "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D", "#B2182B",
    "#67001F"),
  calcptsizesc = 3800,
  output_dir = NULL,
  object_name = "",
  subset_name = ""
)

Arguments

seurat_object

A Seurat object with spatial images.

features

Character vector of gene names or numeric metadata column names.

layout_method

Character. "auto" (default) or "metadata".

row_var

Character or NULL. Slide-level metadata column for grouping images into rows (required when layout_method = "metadata").

images_to_plot

Character vector or NULL. Subset of image names to include. NULL uses all images.

remove_outliers

Logical. Crop outlier cells before plotting. Default FALSE.

outlier_prob

Numeric. Quantile to trim when remove_outliers = TRUE. Default 0.01.

size_override

Scalar or named numeric list. A plain number (e.g. size_override = 1.5) applies to all images; a named list applies per image. Overrides auto-sizing.

colors

Character vector. Gradient colors from low to high.

calcptsizesc

Numeric. Scaling constant for auto point-size calculation. Default 100.

output_dir

Character or NULL. Output directory for PDFs. Returns last plot when NULL.

object_name

Character. Label appended to PDF filenames. Default "".

Value

Invisibly returns the last plot when output_dir = NULL.

Details

Supports two layout modes:

"auto"

Automatic 1- or 2-row grid.

"metadata"

Groups images into rows based on a slide-level metadata variable (row_var). The variable must have a single unique value per image.

Functions

  • PlotSpatialFeaturePlots(): Preferred short alias.

On this page
